_comment: Inline photo manifest (supplement §3). Every entry is a REAL Speedy Gonzalez job or asset photo, personally verified before its alt text was written — no photo is described that has not been looked at, and no stock is included. Sources: the client's Google Business Profile media library (pulled 2026-07-16) and the job-photo library. build-images.mjs reads this and emits AVIF/WebP/JPEG at 800w and 500w into public/images/inline/. Alt text describes only what is visible in the frame.

photos.name: metal-roof-lakefront
photos.alt: Dark standing seam metal roof on a large two-story lakefront home in the Hot Springs area, installed by Speedy Gonzalez Roofing

photos.name: roof-rebuild-crew
photos.alt: A Speedy Gonzalez Roofing crew framing new roof rafters over an older low-slope roof on a Hot Springs home

photos.name: finished-metal-porch
photos.alt: White two-story Hot Springs home with a new gray metal porch roof and a Speedy Gonzalez Roofing yard banner out front

photos.name: aged-shingle-inspection
photos.alt: Close-up of worn, weathered three-tab asphalt shingles with mismatched patches during a Hot Springs roof inspection

photos.name: metal-building-carport
photos.alt: Gray steel building with white trim and open carport wings, built by Speedy Gonzalez in a wooded Garland County lot

photos.name: cedar-post-carport
photos.alt: Custom porch roof on a gray metal building held up by natural cedar-log posts, built by Speedy Gonzalez

photos.name: wrapped-work-truck
photos.alt: Speedy Gonzalez Roofing wrapped work truck reading Hail, Wind or Storm Damage with the 207 Albert Pike Rd, Hot Springs address

photos.name: hot-springs-shop
photos.alt: The Speedy Gonzalez Roofing shop on Albert Pike Rd in Hot Springs, Arkansas, with the company sign on the wall

photos.name: reroof-in-progress-tyvek
photos.alt: Large Hot Springs home mid-reroof, wrapped in house wrap with a roofer working near the ridge

photos.name: storm-damaged-roof
photos.alt: Central Arkansas home with shingles torn off and decking exposed after a severe storm

photos.name: storm-damaged-wood-shakes
photos.alt: Cracked and lifted wood shake roof covered in fresh green leaf debris after a severe Arkansas storm
